title: No Pumpkin Blur and Low Fire
description: This pack removes the pumpkin blur and lowers the fire overlay
body:
**_This resource pack removes the blur when wearing a pumpkin and lowers the fire on the screen._**
**Version 1.13 to 1.21.x**

--- _If Minecraft shows the message "**Incompatible**" the pack should work the same, so you can ignore it._ --- **On the left:** Vanilla minecraft
**On the right:** Using this pack ![Pumpkin blur difference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c598d2df40861cc61305c928d611c7b135cffd0.png) ![Fire difference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9c3e76207c1a9a6f5557ac74b3466d8de9ac4e0.png) **Optifine is not needed**
